SEARCH

Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.scanner

package com.societegenerale.failover.core.scanner
Classpath scanner that discovers @Failover-annotated methods at startup.

FailoverScanner uses the Reflections library to locate all methods annotated with Failover and registers them with the handler and store.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.societegenerale.failover.core
    Central failover handler and execution abstractions.
  • Class
    Description
    DefaultFailoverScanner
    Default FailoverScanner backed by the Reflections library.
    ExceptionHandler
    Strategy for executing a scanner operation with exception translation.
    ExceptionHandlerExecutor
    Functional interface for a scanner operation that may throw a runtime exception.
    FailoverScanner
    Scans the application classpath for methods annotated with Failover and provides lookup by name.
    FailoverScannerException
    Thrown when the FailoverScanner encounters an error during classpath scanning or detects duplicate @Failover names.
    ReflectionsExceptionHandler
    ExceptionHandler that wraps unexpected RuntimeExceptions from the Reflections library into a FailoverScannerException with a diagnostic message.
